# CS103 — Flat post-enforcement done CS (CS43 fixture e)

**Status:** done
**Closed:** 2026-05-15

This fixture verifies the CS43 walker still iterates `.md` files placed
DIRECTLY inside `project/clickstops/done/` (not in a nested subfolder)
alongside the new recursion. Both code paths must coexist.
